title: How to make private a board to a normal board?
excerpt:
Hi, 
Could you please help me change the private board to a normal board where all of the members can see it? Where is the button? 
Looking forward to hear back. Thanks

posts.author: Sandesh (Sandesh)
posts.cookedHtml:
